raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased 2 tickets from XXXX. Those thickets where cancelled the same day. I received an email from XXXX that the purchase is being refunded. It was not. I disputed the charge with Citi XXXX XXXX. They told me it was 2 different disputes after they refunded the first {$530.00}. I had to file again for the second ticket, which I did 2 different times. They said they received the information a second time. However, the XXXXnvestigator refused to investigate. They told me they sent a letter, which I never received and now the time was up. Citi has told me I have to pay it. The confirmation for the ticket purchase XXXX.
